title: Pentagon, FAA sign agreement on deploying anti-drone laser system near Mexico
content: The agreement came after the FAA conducted testing in New Mexico on the laser system used by the Pentagon and Homeland Security Department.

title: Ukrainian drone makers visit Paris looking for co-production deals
content: “We come with our lessons learned,” Kamyshin said. “We offer a model which is definitely beneficial for your country, for your industry, for your economy."

title: Bahrain First To Claim F-16 Block 70 Air-To-Air Kills
